prompt: 创建一个新项目：BVF团队Q2季度OKR，tag用work/bvf/FY27Q2，截止日期2026-09-30

assertions.name: directory_created
assertions.description: 在1.Projects/下创建了正确的项目目录 work-bvf-FY27Q2/

assertions.name: readme_created
assertions.description: 创建了README文件 FY27Q2.README.md，包含正确的frontmatter

assertions.name: frontmatter_tags
assertions.description: frontmatter tags包含 PARA/Projects 和 work/bvf/FY27Q2

assertions.name: quarterly_link
assertions.description: 关联到了对应的季度笔记
